public_reputation: Known around Ironhold Quarry through day-to-day work as ore officer.
manner: Measures value in extraction, custody, and loss prevention, never quite relaxing around unsecured loads. In Ironhold Quarry, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ore officer in and around Ironhold Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ironhold Quarry workable through the obligations of ore officer while managing the immediate pressure of labor harshness, resource theft, border competition.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of ore officer credible while absorbing the strain created by labor harshness, resource theft, border competition.

adventure_hooks.summary: Darian Ironspike can draw the party into a locality problem centered on ore officer duties in Ironhold Quarry.
Darian Ironspike becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with labor harshness, resource theft, border competition around Ironhold Quarry.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Darian Ironspike is immediately readable as a ore officer tied to Ironhold Quarry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironhold Quarry: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Darian Ironspike presents as someone shaped by the duties of a ore officer and the daily pressures of Ironhold Quarry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a ore officer, and proof that strangers will not make Ironhold Quarry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Darian Ironspike refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a ore officer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can open resource access, spot theft, and connect extraction to wider political pressure.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Darian Ironspike adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Darian Ironspike always knows more about Ironhold Quarry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a ore officer in Ironhold Quarry.
